title: Penalty for violations
doc_html:
§2925.  Penalty for violations

Any officer violating R.S. 33:2921 through R.S. 33:2924 shall be imprisoned or fined, or both.  The fine shall not exceed one thousand dollars or the imprisonment one year.
doc_text:
§2925.  Penalty for violations
Any officer violating R.S. 33:2921 through R.S. 33:2924 shall be imprisoned or fined, or both.  The fine shall not exceed one thousand dollars or the imprisonment one year.
